facebook.caption:
4.9 stars. 1,683 reviews. At a fusion restaurant in Phu Quoc.

FUSION Treats on Đường Dinh Bà is quietly racking up one of the highest ratings on the island. Not a resort. Not a beachfront tourist trap. Just food that earns a near-perfect score, review after review.

If your Phu Quoc itinerary only has the same four spots everyone books, add this one.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
